info.description: Control plane for xpaywall — manages projects, routes, users, payment channels, and request logs.
info.title: xpaywall Control API

parameters.description: Period: day, week, month, custom (default: 7 days)
parameters.name: period

parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD or DD.MM.YYYY) — required for period=custom
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD or DD.MM.YYYY) — required for period=custom
parameters.name: to

parameters.description: Number of days (used when period is not set, default 7, max 90)
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD or DD.MM.YYYY) — required for period=custom
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD or DD.MM.YYYY) — required for period=custom
parameters.name: to

config.description:
MPP config (rpc_url/secret_key/method). RawMessage so it round-trips as a
JSON object instead of a base64 string ([]byte would do the latter).

ApiKeyAuth.description: Internal API key shared between xgateway and control-api
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
